constraints_1_content: Use `jq` for parsing JSONL files (payments.jsonl, refunds.jsonl). Do NOT attempt to parse JSON with awk/sed/grep regex — it is error-prone with escaped characters and nested structures.
constraints_1_rationale: Specific to this task's JSONL inputs; applies regardless of agent framework.
constraints_2_content: When building intermediate temp files, place them under /tmp/reconcile/ (create with `mkdir -p`). Do not pollute /app/data/in or /app/out with intermediate artifacts.
constraints_2_rationale: Keeps input/output directories clean for this data pipeline task; framework-independent.
constraints_3_content: Before the main processing, use Bash to confirm `/app/out` exists: `mkdir -p /app/out`. Then verify with `ls /app/out/` after script execution to confirm all six files were created.
constraints_3_rationale: Ensures output directory readiness for this task; explicitly uses Bash.
constraints_4_content: Use TodoWrite to outline the processing stages (inventory scan → order dedup → payment matching → refund matching → session building → summary) before writing the script, to ensure no output file is forgotten.
constraints_4_rationale: Planning the multi-stage pipeline is task-specific; TodoWrite is a ClaudeCode tool.
